## What does this PR do?

One-paragraph summary of the change and the motivation.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / chore
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes (all tests green)
- [ ] New facts carry provenance (`doc_id` + page/bbox/row) where applicable
- [ ] Offline path still works with no network (`DEMO_STRICT=1`)
- [ ] Eval rerun (`python -m eval.run`) if retrieval/extraction quality is affected — metric movement noted below
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits

| Metric | before | after |
